raw_text:
verdict=ESCALATE
reason=REQ-001 lacks the required callback_scope=destination_account_token; SRC-003 says this is mandatory, while SRC-001 is for vendor_profile_update and SRC-002 has callback_scope=contact_identity, so the records do not authorize this payment_rail_change.
